sprint_meta.notes: WK17 Quality, Logic, & Immersion. Agent 03 Round 2: vision hooks + memory leak fixes.

wk17_r2_execution_integration.prompt_text: Review Agent 10 memory leak profile and implement fix; implement Agent 05 visibility rules (engine hooks for neutral buildings and guards as vision sources).

summary_bullets: Fog of war: added revealers for neutral buildings (house/farm/food_stand) and living guards in _update_fog_of_war(); radii per docs/vision_rules_fog_of_war.md.
Memory: cached PAUSED overlay font in engine (_pause_font, created once) to avoid per-frame Font allocation.
Memory: added bounded path cache in pathfinding.py (key (start,goal), max 256, FIFO); validate cached path before return; reduces A* allocation churn.
how_to_test: Manual: run with neutral buildings/guards; fog clears around them; long session for memory plateau
